info.name: AdminSuite API
info.description:
Complete API collection for AdminSuite ERP — Administrative Officer II, Department of Education.

**Auth:** All protected endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{auth_token}}`. The Login request auto-saves the token.

**IDs:** All resource `{id}` route parameters are UUIDs. Set the `uuid` collection variable to the UUID you want to test.

query.description: Filter by role: Super Admin, Admin Officer, School Head, Teacher/Staff
Active, Inactive, On Leave, Retired, Resigned
